svg.title: RISC-V Multi-Core SoC Block Diagram
svg.desc: Full SoC diagram showing 4 RV64GC cores with L1 caches, shared L2 cache, ring NoC, memory controller, interrupt controller, DMA, debug module, and APB peripherals.

g.text: Ring NoC — AMBA ACE / AXI4 · 128-bit · credit-flow

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the L2 cache MESI coherence protocol')
sendPrompt('Explain the PLIC and CLINT interrupt controllers')
sendPrompt('Explain the RISC-V debug module and JTAG interface')
sendPrompt('How does the DMA controller work?')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the memory controller and LPDDR4 interface')
sendPrompt('What is stored in the boot ROM?')

g.text: APB4 peripheral bus — 250 MHz · async CDC bridge

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How is the UART peripheral implemented?')
sendPrompt('How is the SPI peripheral implemented?')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the GPIO block')
sendPrompt('What timers does the SoC have?')
sendPrompt('How does the clock and PLL subsystem work?')
